title: Prepare Gravity Courier project scaffold
notes: Create isolated docs, goals, package skeleton, and validation path.

title: Create first playable gravity-assist prototype
notes: Implemented rocket controls, planet gravity, trajectory preview, HUD, collision, restart, and gravity assist feedback.

title: Add gameplay roadmap and system specs
notes: Document score/lap, planet rewards, cheering, crew, and interplanet object plans without adding gameplay systems.

title: Implement score, lap count, and planet lap display
notes: Implemented score value, per-planet lap count, score gain on assist, lap multiplier, large lap display, HUD score, and simple 3-stage cheer text feedback.

title: Implement planet types and 2-lap reward activation
notes: Implemented planet type definitions and Wind, Iron, Water, Forest, and Rock rewards that activate once at lap 2.

title: Implement resource-backed shared cheer cut-in framework
notes: Implemented shared cut-in behavior, resident registry, 32x32 sprite metadata, .pyxres-backed portrait loading path with primitive fallback, planet-specific resident IDs, cheer stage effects, timing, and cooldown.

title: Fix lap event, per-lap cut-ins, side cut-in placement, and Transfer Boost clarity
notes: Separated lap completion from Transfer Boost, moved score/reward/cut-in triggering to completed orbit laps, added side slide-in cut-ins, and clarified Transfer Boost as a one-time gravity-well exit event after one or more laps.

title: Document supply ship, crew growth, final goal, and result specs
notes: Added the supply ship reservation, crew join sequence, finite shuffle-bag course, Earth-like final goal, result screen, and crossing meteor swarm plan.

title: Implement interplanet obstacles and collectibles
notes: Implemented floating asteroids, crossing rockets with warning timing, normal supply items, collision/collection logic, shield/HP obstacle damage, and scoring/fuel rewards. Supply ships, crew growth, final goal, result screen, and crossing meteor swarms remain future work.

title: Implement supply ship and crew growth UI
notes: Implemented lap 3 supply ship reservations, deterministic 2-3 Transfer Boost delay approximation, cargo score/fuel/crew rewards, planet-type crew counts, [1,2,4,8,16,32,64] crew joins, missed-cargo rules, protagonist marker, and compact in-run crew display.

title: Tune finite course generation, difficulty, and meteor swarms
notes: Implemented seeded 35-planet shuffle-bag course generation, exactly 7 appearances per normal type, fairness constraints, course gap metadata, supply gap marking, crossing meteor swarms, and deterministic difficulty helpers. Deeper balance tuning remains future work.

title: Document post-goal polish, mode, navigation, and asset roadmap
notes: Added implementation-ready specs for Normal/Hard modes, off-course helper, orbit focus presentation, sprite assets, procedural planet visuals, result test helper, title screen, mobile boundaries, and post-GRC009 task order.

title: Implement final goal and result screen
notes: Implemented an Earth-like final goal separate from normal planets, compact Journey Progress UI with PLANET current/35 and a goal progress bar, optional NEXT SUPPLY hint, goal arrival detection, final score, crew bonus, result state, result screen, crew count display, density-based crew/crowd rendering, staggered celebration, and rank display.

title: Add result-screen test helper
notes: Added a DEBUG/DEMO-only bottom-right GOAL TEST button and G-key fallback, cycling crew presets 12/50/51/200/201/635, deterministic crew distribution, test score/resources, safe pre-goal placement, and normal goal-to-result transition coverage for Normal and Hard.

title: Add Normal and Hard course modes
notes: Implemented Normal mode with 20 planets and 4 appearances per normal type, Hard mode with 35 planets and 7 appearances per normal type, shared rules, mode-specific rank thresholds, selected mode in result summary, and temporary N-key mode toggling before title-screen selection.

title: Add orbit focus presentation
notes: Added orbit focus strength, restrained world-camera zoom capped at 1.12, midpoint camera focus, deterministic screen-space concentration lines, cut-in attenuation, smooth Transfer Boost release, and tests without adding screen shake or changing orbit physics.

title: Add off-course recovery helper
notes: Added next-course-target off-course detection, screen-edge NEXT/GOAL arrow, distance display, debug state, safe HUD placement, and tests without altering physics.

title: Enrich procedural planet visuals
notes: Added layered planet rendering with type-specific Wind/Iron/Water/Forest/Rock/Black Hole surfaces, atmosphere rings, sparse particles, deterministic animation, and tests without changing physics or collision behavior.

title: Integrate first Hero sprite from Pyxel resource
notes: Integrated the developer-authored 32x32 Hero sprite and five resident idle sprites from assets/gravity_courier.pyxres, mapped them to image bank 0 with palette color 14 as transparent, rendered ready sprites where applicable, and kept missing-resource and unready-stage fallbacks.

title: Complete resident and Hero sprite integration
notes: Added resident/Hero sprite readiness inventories, per-planet resident stage readiness, Hero state readiness, fallback behavior for unready cheer/result cells, atlas documentation, and tests. Rocket sprite integration was already handled separately and is not part of this remaining scope.

title: Mobile/touch readiness pass
notes: Implemented shared ControlIntent input for keyboard and touch, screen-space horizontal drag steering with high-speed assist and clamped response, upward/downward gentle thrust/brake swipe pulses, always-on trajectory preview, and mobile-oriented HUD control hints while preserving keyboard support.

title: Add gameplay audio manager and stage sounds
notes: Added a fallback-safe AudioManager, layered title BGM with low accompaniment and high music-box harmony, thin looping cruise BGM, staged lap sounds, transfer boost, supply, damage, crash, and result sounds, plus an S-key/title SOUND toggle.

title: Implement title screen and mode selection
notes: Implemented title state, START, Normal/Hard selection, DEMO entry, SOUND toggle, concise touch/keyboard guidance, and title-safe audio behavior.

title: Performance measurement and first optimization pass
notes: Added DEBUG timing readouts, cached trajectory preview recalculation, reduced gameplay starfield draw count, reduced orbit focus line count and confetti particles, added planet draw LOD and pattern caching, throttled non-orbit DEMO AI decisions, and replaced hot collision checks with squared-distance comparisons.

title: Polish and release candidate prototype
notes: Improve visual polish, sound effects if appropriate, feedback, retry loop, title/game over flow, and high score persistence if appropriate.
